g.data-narration: Welcome to Machine Learning Applications. This topic covers how ML transforms industries through real-world solutions.
Machine learning enables systems to learn from data, identify patterns, and make intelligent decisions without explicit programming.
ML applications span seven major domains: Healthcare, Finance, Retail, Manufacturing, Transportation, NLP, and Computer Vision.
Healthcare uses CNN for disease diagnosis from medical images, regression for drug discovery, and time-series for epidemic prediction.
Finance applies anomaly detection for fraud identification, reinforcement learning for algorithmic trading, and classification for credit scoring.
Retail uses collaborative filtering for recommendations, time-series for demand forecasting, and K-Means clustering for customer segmentation.
Manufacturing applies time-series for predictive maintenance, image classification for quality control, and optimization algorithms for supply chain.
Transportation uses deep learning for autonomous vehicles, graph algorithms for route optimization, and time-series for traffic prediction.
NLP uses transformers for chatbots, text classification for sentiment analysis, and sequence-to-sequence models for machine translation.
Computer vision uses CNN for facial recognition, YOLO and R-CNN for object detection, and U-Net for image segmentation tasks.
Understanding which ML technique fits each problem is essential. Supervised for labeled data, unsupervised for patterns, RL for interactive environments.
Compare techniques: supervised needs labeled data, unsupervised finds hidden patterns, RL learns from environment interaction, deep learning handles complex data.
Real-world examples: Google LYNA for cancer detection, JPMorgan COIN for contract analysis, Amazon recommendations, Waymo self-driving.
Key takeaways: ML transforms industries, technique choice depends on problem and data type, supervised learning dominates with labeled data.

g.text: Choice depends on problem type and data
Deep learning excels in vision & language
